meaning: n.法兰绒,法兰绒衣服adj.法兰绒的vt.用法兰绒包(或裹),给...穿上法兰绒衣服
examples: He wore a faded red flannel shirt.
This means no flannel pajamas in bed.
Have flannel PJs replaced your silky negligees?
He wears a flannel shirt, a leather vest with brass snaps, jeans, cowboy boots.
He was wearing a ridiculous cashmere overcoat, and his suit today was a medium-gray flannel herringbone.
